metadata.name: Apply Refund to Next Year's Taxes

description: A taxpayer who is due a refund wants to apply it as a credit toward next year's estimated taxes instead of receiving a check.

nodes.task_description: On Form 1040, enter the refund amount on the line for 'Apply to next year's estimated tax'.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly fills out the appropriate line on the tax form.

nodes.task_description: Confirm with the taxpayer that they will not receive a direct refund this year.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly explains the consequence of their choice.
